text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Okay, that's enough studying for now.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Actually... I think I've got time for one more quick
book before training...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: (I know I shouldn't push myself too hard... But this is nothing for the future number one.)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Right, what should I read? Aha! I know just the
thing to help me with my next race...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I really got sucked in there. There's only a
little bit left... Let's see how I'm doing for time...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What?! It's been an hour! B-but that means...
training's already started!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But there's only a few pages left! And I feel like
I'm on the brink of an epiphany... Trainer won't
mind, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Daiwa Scarlet ends up so fixated on
the idea of being number one that she skips
training...
